title: Parameter
description: Represents a Google Tag Manager Parameter. Parameters are key-value pairs that configure tags, triggers, and variables.

key.description: The named key that uniquely identifies a parameter. Required for top-level parameters, as well as map values. Ignored for list values.

value.description: A parameter's value (may contain variable references) as appropriate to the specified type.

list.description: This list parameter's parameters (keys will be ignored). Used when type is list.

map.description: This map parameter's parameters (must have keys; keys must be unique). Used when type is map.

isWeakReference.description: Whether or not the parameter is a weak reference. Used to determine which parameters should be included in exported containers.
